pr.title: feat(cli):Add local Codex CLI model backend
pr.body:
Adds support for using local Codex CLI as a model backend in GEAK.

What’s included
 - Added codex_cli model implementation
 - Registered the backend in the model registry
 - Added config support in geak.yaml
 - Implemented local subprocess execution + streaming output
 - This allows GEAK to run with a locally installed Codex CLI binary.
pr.author: zihaomu
